# chronyc-rs

The control-client / output-parity tool of [chrony-rs](../../README.md). It renders
the exact textual reports `chronyc` prints, so chrony-rs output can be checked
byte-for-byte against chrony 4.5.

This file is **generated** (`cargo xtask gen`) and freshness-gated.

## What it does

- Offline rendering of `tracking` / `sources` / `sourcestats` / `activity` /
`serverstats` reports from a JSON fixture, with layouts live-witnessed against
chrony 4.5 (see [`docs/chronyc-parity.md`](../../docs/chronyc-parity.md)).

## What it deliberately does NOT do

No live control-socket transport to a running daemon (the wire protocol is not yet
modeled); it renders from fixtures only. See
[`docs/negative-capabilities.md`](../../docs/negative-capabilities.md). Targets
chrony 4.5.


## crates.io

Published at [crates.io/crates/chronyc-rs](https://crates.io/crates/chronyc-rs).
Install with `cargo install chronyc-rs`.
Part of the [chrony-rs](https://crates.io/crates/chrony-rs) workspace.
